programme.title: Atashinchi
programme.desc: Mikan, Yuzuhiko and their parents navigate their daily lives while confronting various challenges. However, the Tachibana family is known for their clumsiness.

programme.title: Selfie With Bajrangi
programme.desc: Ankush's life changes when he meets a mysterious nine-year-old child named Bajrangi, who is visible to nobody but him alone.

programme.title: Pokemon
programme.desc: A Pokémon master embarks on an adventurous journey across the world, along with his group of friends, to catch maximum pocket monsters.

programme.desc: A Pokémon master embarks on an adventurous journey across the world, along with his group of friends, to catch maximum pocket monsters.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: A five-year-old boy, has many misadventures due to his peculiar antics, while his parents and tutors try to discipline him.

programme.desc: A five-year-old boy who lives with his parents and his sister embarks on mischievous adventures that often lead to hilarious consequences.

programme.title: Perman
programme.desc: Mitsuo Suwa, a clumsy boy, works as an apprentice for Birdman to become a powerful superhero, Perman, and rescues the victims of crime and disasters.

programme.title: Taffy
programme.desc: Mrs Muchmore ends up adopting a raccoon named Taffy after mistaking it for a cat. But while Taffy enjoys his life with Mrs Muchmore, her Doberman, Bentley, is determined to expose Taffy as a fraud.

programme.title: Taffy
programme.desc: Mrs Muchmore ends up adopting a raccoon named Taffy after mistaking it for a cat. But while Taffy enjoys his life with Mrs Muchmore, her Doberman, Bentley, is determined to expose Taffy as a fraud.

programme.title: Doraemon Nobita Ka Gadget Ghotala
programme.desc: The story revolves around a robotic cat named doraemon, who travels back in time from the 22nd century to aid a pre-teen boy named nobita nobi.

programme.title: Doraemon
programme.desc: Doraemon, a robot cat from the future, travels back in time to take care of a young boy named Nobita Nobi with the help of his futuristic gadgets.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Honey and Bunny, two cats who are twin brothers, go on exciting adventures while protecting each other from enemies at every turn.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae takes Shin-chan with her to see a movie. However, at the theatre, Shin-chan annoys everyone and consequently, he and Misae are asked to leave.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Hiroshi and Shin-chan need a haircut, they visit a salon but Shin-chan annoys the barber with his mischief and causes her to quit.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan brushes his teeth with new toothpaste and eats unhealthy snacks right after. As a result, Misae is left infuriated and she berates him.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Shin-chan becomes sick, Misae buys medicine to help him get better and teaches him how to gargle. However, Shin-chan behaves mischievously.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan tries to offer his assistance to Misae in preparing their meals for dinner. However, his participation complicates the situation.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae has ordered a pizza but Shin-chan drops it and refrains from telling her. However, later when Misae eats it, she realises what happened.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Misae makes the decision to throw away Shin-chan's toys, Shin-chan tries to hide all of them at Shinobu's house.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Shin-chan is taking a bath, he begins to play with Misae's expensive toiletries and ends up wasting all of her body washes.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Shin-chan is not able to reach home before his curfew, his mother Misae is left annoyed. As a result, she punishes him.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: After Shin-chan is accompanied by his friends to Nene-chan's house, her mother prepares a cake for them. However, Shin-chan's mischief ruins it.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shinnosuke Nohara, a five-year-old boy with a fascination for older women, commits frequent mischief around his friends and family.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shinchan nohara is a little boy who seems to do everything he can to annoy his parents and teachers (and succeeds wildly), but only means the best. he just tries to have a good time.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan is taken to a music school by Misae so he can learn music. However, the teacher of the institution leaves Misae upset.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan takes Shiro for a walk after playing with him. However, Shiro later eats the entirety of the meat Shin-chan's family had put aside for dinner.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan brushes his teeth with new toothpaste and eats unhealthy snacks right after. As a result, Misae is left infuriated and she berates him.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When a cockroach infests the house, Misae asks Shin-chan to help her be rid of it. However, misadventures ensue and the cockroach remains.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan and his mother visit the station and await the arrival of the train. Later, Shin-chan forces Misae to take him to a washroom.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae is followed by Shin-chan when she is on her way to the bank. Once there, Shin-chan annoys her and keeps her from withdrawing any cash.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Keiko opts to help Shin-chan take some photographs when he gets the chance to pose for a magazine advertisement. However, Shin-chan accidentally breaks her camera.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: A five-year-old boy, has many misadventures due to his peculiar antics, while his parents and tutors try to discipline him.

programme.desc: Shin-chan, a mischievous five-year-old, constantly disrupts the lives of those around him with his childish antics, generating humorous chaos and exasperation.

programme.title: Shin Chan Movie-The Spy
programme.desc: When a girl named Lemon delivers a message to Shin-Chan, it sets off a chain of events leading him to trains as a special agent for a daring mission.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Shin-chan is not able to reach home before his curfew, his mother Misae is left annoyed. As a result, she punishes him.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan takes Shiro for a walk after playing with him. However, Shiro later eats the entirety of the meat Shin-chan's family had put aside for dinner.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae prepares a meal to eat but as she tries to do so, Shin-chan causes a nuisance by playing with the food and annoys her.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Hiroshi plans to train Shin-chan to become a baseball player. However, on the day of training, he forgets Shin-chan and takes Shiro with him instead.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan visits Keiko-san at the hospital with Misae and raises a nuisance for the nurse. Consequently, Misae scolds him for his mischief.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shinnosuke Nohara, a five-year-old boy with a fascination for older women, commits frequent mischief around his friends and family.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: In order to buy taiyaki for his mother Misae, Shin-chan visits a store. However, he proceeds to cause a nuisance and annoy the storekeeper.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: During a soccer match, Kawamura faces Shin-chan and his friends. However, he underestimates their skills and ends up losing to them.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: On a hot summer day, Shin-chan pesters Misae to purchase an ice crusher for him. However, he eats too much of it and suffers a stomachache.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan is taken to a music school by Misae so he can learn music. However, the teacher of the institution leaves Misae upset.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Shin-chan is staying at Yoshinaga's house, he snoops around to find something different. However, Yoshinaga catches him in the act.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Misae suffers from a backache, she visits a doctor for a diagnosis and Shin-chan accompanies her. However, Shin-chan annoys the doctor.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: A five-year-old boy, has many misadventures due to his peculiar antics, while his parents and tutors try to discipline him.

programme.title: Shinchan in Rakuga Kingdom
programme.desc: After chaos ensues in the floating kingdom of Rakuga, the military forces children to take magical crayons to scribble back the life to the lands.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: A five-year-old boy, has many misadventures due to his peculiar antics, while his parents and tutors try to discipline him.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: The kids, injected with venom, cry out to Baalveer for help. However, Baalveer realises that his magic is ineffective and seeks help from the fairies.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Baalveer asks the fairies to help him find a way to reduce the pain caused by an insect sting. Later, they tell him to get soil from the north and flowers from the south of the Earth.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Baalveer sets out to get the ingredients required to reduce the pain caused by the venom. Later, he faces difficult conditions while travelling to the south.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Rani Pari and other fairies ask Bhayankar Pari to apologise for his behaviour. Later, the fairies and DD try to keep the kids awake by involving them in various games and activities.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: When Montu learns that Manav and Meher have been bitten by 'mayavi bhavre', he makes every effort to awaken them.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Daityani Pari goes to drink water from a particular well in order to regain her lost strength. Meanwhile, Baalveer and Baalpari lock the doors of the well using magic.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: An unfortunate situation occurs when Daya and Jethalal reach Ahmedabad and Sunder lands in Gokuldham Society to meet Daya.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After much struggle and delay, Daya and Sunder finally meet and are able to celebrate Raksha Bandhan together.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sunder takes Jethalal and Daya out for a special meal. Later, Jethalal is impressed but he still finds it suspicious.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal decides to finally come clean with his potential bride and tell her everything honestly without knowing how she would react.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The inhabitants of Gokuldham Society are worried about Popatlal after Madhubala makes her decision regarding marrying him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Madhubala, along with her family, meets Popatlal and his friends in order to finally reveal her decision about marrying him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The entirety of the Gokuldham colony is bursting with happiness and excitement as they make preparations for Popatlal's engagement.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal struggles to try and keep his nerves in check as he is very excited but also anxious about his engagement ceremony and hopes that the day goes without a hitch.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone is overjoyed and excited at Popatlal's engagement ceremony as he hopes that the day goes as planned without a hitch.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal's engagement ceremony is just around the corner and everybody is eagerly waiting to welcome his beautiful bride to the family.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Popatlal is nowhere to be found on the day of his engagement, Inspector Pandey holds the members of the Gokuldham colony responsible for his disappearance.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal is left heartbroken when Dr. Hathi informs him that both he and Madhubala are carriers for a rare genetic disorder. The doctor warns that their children could develop serious health issues.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu Sena is eager to celebrate with the colony as they return from Pune with their award. But, they are not sure how to approach Popatlal as he may still be upset about his cancelled wedding.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: In order to connect with each other and share a few laughs, the women of Gokuldham colony organise and attend a kitty party.

programme.title: Crime Patrol
programme.desc: The host presents dramatised re-enactments of real-life crime cases that revolve around harassment, kidnapping and murder.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: A young couple finds a woman's dead body in a bathing tub. When the CID team investigates the matter, they discover that she was drowned to death in a chocolate tub.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Things get intense as Babli arrives for the intriguing challenge. Later, Popatlal gears up and meets Babli as the competition begins.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: During the competition, Babli constantly cuts the kites of her competitors. Meanwhile, Popatlal holds off from entering the contest until 4:00 p.m.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Amidst a fierce kite-flying duel, Babli and Popatlal's rivalry reaches new heights as they skilfully manoeuvre to sever each other's kites.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide embarrasses himself in front of the ladies of Gokuldham. Later, Daya asks Jethalal to help her with ideas for the party.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: All the ladies have fun when Daya hosts a tea party for them at her house. Later, Anjali narrates the story of her and Taarak's initial meeting.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: At Gada Electronics, Jethalal gets annoyed with Bagha's clumsiness. Later, Taarak and Anjali share a romantic moment.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The ladies of Gokuldham want their husbands to write poetry for them. However, the husbands are a bit taken aback by the request.

programme.title: Yashomati Maiyya Ke Nandlala
programme.desc: Yashoda prepares Neel Mani for his Shashthi pooja. Meanwhile, Kansa decides to enlist Bhootna's help to find and put an end to Vishnu's avatar.

programme.title: Super Dancer -- Chapter 5
programme.desc: Mithun Chakraborty arrives as the guest judge to inspire the contestants before the final. Later, the judges witness some dazzling performances.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Madhvi is about to throw Bhide's tape recorder out of the house, he intervenes. Bhide goes on to explain the importance of the tape recorder in his life.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal tasks Bagha with the responsibility of fixing Bhide's tape recorder, but things take an unexpected turn as Bagha drops the tape recorder on the floor and damages it.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal is furious to see Iyer badmouthing him in front of the whole society and lashes out at Iyer for his actions.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Iyer makes all of Gokuldham's men gather at the soda shop to discuss how Babita is not happy to be with him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Babita tries to contact Iyer to ask about his presentation, but Iyer ignores her calls. He drinks at the bar to ease his heartbreak.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Iyer's friends try to find Iyer at the bar so that they can take him home. However, getting Iyer to go home is a difficult task.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Iyer's friends attempt to take the drunken Iyer home safely without the rest of the society noticing. They relay a message to Babita.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal lets Iyer stay at his place and takes care of him. Popatlal is frustrated with Iyer's behaviour and asks Jethalal for advice.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: In the early morning, the men of Gokuldham go on a walk to discuss how they should handle Iyer's problematic condition.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Iyer believes that Babita is not in love with him after they meet face-to-face; Iyer's friends stay put at Popatlal's house and wait for Iyer's explanation.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The regular newspaper vendor of Gokuldham Society commits a humorous mistake by giving Sodhi a Marathi paper and Bhide a Punjabi one. This leads to the two families eating together.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bagha panics when he realises that the keys to the shop's locker are in Bawree's house. Jethalal learns about this and harshly scolds him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide learns that Manoj, a customer of Madhvi's products, has not paid his money in six months and decides to go to his house and confront him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After taking Manoj's payment, Bhide encounters a drunk man while returning home. The stranger keeps calling for an autorickshaw that is not there.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide saves the life of the drunk man on the road, who gives him a briefcase full of gold in return. Bhide takes it in shock and returns home in haste.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide brings the briefcase full of gold to Gokuldham in secret. He does not know what to do with it and decides to get help from his friends.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide gets nervous when he learns the exact value of the gold in the briefcase and asks the residents of Gokuldham what he should do with it.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: While sleeping, Bhide has a bad dream in which robbers steal the gold from Jethalal at gunpoint. He wakes up in a panic and runs to Jethalal's house.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Dhanraj, the jeweller who Bhide previously encountered, goes to the police to report his missing gold bars. The inspector starts his investigation by trying to find Dhanraj's phone.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The police come to Gokuldham Society and arrest Bhide for allegedly stealing the gold bars. They question his friends and assume they are a gang of robbers.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The police refuse to believe Bhide's story of Dhanraj giving him the gold while drunk. Dhanraj hears this and asks him why he did not hand the gold over to the police if his story was true.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The judge rules in Dhanraj's favour and Bhide is put in jail for stealing the gold. However, the Gokuldham residents come up with a plan to get him out of prison.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal disguises himself as a gold businessman from Jodhpur and meets Dhanraj as part of the Gokuldham residents' plan to get Bhide out of jail.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of Gokuldham execute their plan to trap Dhanraj Seth in order to prove Bhide's innocence and get him out of prison.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal and his friends recreate the scenario in which Dhanraj gave Bhide the gold to convince the police to release him from jail.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of Gokuldham manage to get sufficient proof to get Bhide out of jail. However, Dhanraj has his own evidence at hand.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of Gokuldham fail to convince Inspector Chalu Pandey to release Bhide. Jethalal ends up joining him in prison.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal and Bhide's arrests shock everyone in Gokuldham. Daya comes up with a plan win the taxi driver's support.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide and all of his friends are inside the lockup on allegations of stealing the briefcase full of gold. However, the Mahila Mandal of Gokuldham Society have devised a plan to prove them innocent.

programme.title: Hui Gumm Yaadein Ek Doctor, Do Zindagiyaan
programme.desc: Following a traumatic accident and losing eight years of memory, Dr Dev struggles to rebuild his life as his former wife, Srishti, balances motherhood with running their medical facility.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Anvita shoulders the burden of raising her five siblings amidst their father's alcoholism.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Hui Gumm Yaadein Ek Doctor, Do Zindagiyaan
programme.desc: Following a traumatic accident and an eight-year memory loss, Dr Dev struggles to rebuild his life as his former wife, Srishti, balances motherhood with running their medical facility.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Anvita shoulders the responsibility of caring for her five younger siblings. As she navigates her family duties, she also strives to balance her emotional turmoil.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: After doing various odd jobs, an uneducated woman from Gujarat starts a business to earn a living and attempts to keep her family happy.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Anvita shoulders the responsibility of caring for her five younger siblings. As she navigates her family duties, she also strives to balance her emotional turmoil.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Maddam Sir
programme.desc: Cheetah Chaturvedi finds himself in trouble as a damsel in distress accuses him of betraying her and breaking her heart. Fortunately for Cheetah Chaturvedi, Haseena stands by him.

programme.title: Maddam Sir
programme.desc: As a bald Namman claims to have lost his hair, Billu asks him to apply some gobar on his head in order to regain his lost hair.

programme.title: Hui Gumm Yaadein Ek Doctor, Do Zindagiyaan
programme.desc: Following a traumatic accident and an eight-year memory loss, Dr Dev struggles to rebuild his life as his former wife, Srishti, balances motherhood with running their medical facility.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: After doing various odd jobs, an uneducated woman from Gujarat starts a business to earn a living and attempts to keep her family happy.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide feels nervous after he learns that Sonu is paired with Tapu for the quiz. Madhavi, however, tries to calm him down.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal gets happy as his partner for the quiz is Babita. Goli feels guilty for giving Jethalal the wrong question and answers for the quiz.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Anvita shoulders the responsibility of caring for her five younger siblings. As she navigates her family duties, she also strives to balance her emotional turmoil.

programme.title: Maddam Sir
programme.desc: Cheetah Chaturvedi finds himself in trouble as a damsel in distress accuses him of betraying her and breaking her heart. Fortunately for Cheetah Chaturvedi, Haseena stands by him.

programme.title: Maddam Sir
programme.desc: As a bald Namman claims to have lost his hair, Billu asks him to apply some gobar on his head in order to regain his lost hair.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: After doing various odd jobs, an uneducated woman from Gujarat starts a business to earn a living and attempts to keep her family happy.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu Sena makes a plan to sabotage All-in-one bhai's garba event by disconnecting his speakers. They do this as revenge for All-in-one bhai asking the Gokuldham residents to cancel their function.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal and his neighbours organise their garba function at the same time when All-in-one bhai stages his mega-dandiya raas event.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: After doing various odd jobs, an uneducated woman from Gujarat starts a business to earn a living and attempts to keep her family happy.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Hui Gumm Yaadein Ek Doctor, Do Zindagiyaan
programme.desc: Following a traumatic accident and an eight-year memory loss, Dr Dev struggles to rebuild his life as his former wife, Srishti, balances motherhood with running their medical facility.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Anvita shoulders the responsibility of caring for her five younger siblings. As she navigates her family duties, she also strives to balance her emotional turmoil.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: After doing various odd jobs, an uneducated woman from Gujarat starts a business to earn a living and attempts to keep her family happy.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide feels nervous after he learns that Sonu is paired with Tapu for the quiz. Madhavi, however, tries to calm him down.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal gets happy as his partner for the quiz is Babita. Goli feels guilty for giving Jethalal the wrong question and answers for the quiz.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The Ganesh Chaturthi celebration finally comes to an end. Everyone is sad after the Visarjan. Tapu Sena is ready for their next task, which is the celebration of Gandhi Jayanti.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal tries to hurry up home after Babita prepares a Bengali cuisine for him. Later, he gets angry when Champaklal interrupts his and Babita's conversation.

programme.title: Hui Gumm Yaadein Ek Doctor, Do Zindagiyaan
programme.desc: Following a traumatic accident and an eight-year memory loss, Dr Dev struggles to rebuild his life as his former wife, Srishti, balances motherhood with running their medical facility.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Anvita shoulders the responsibility of caring for her five younger siblings. As she navigates her family duties, she also strives to balance her emotional turmoil.

programme.title: Best of Crime Patrol
programme.desc: Some of the best cases of 'Crime Patrol', which investigates how innocent people turn into criminals due to the influence of evil in society.

programme.title: The Kapil Sharma Show - Masti Lagataar
programme.desc: Host Kapil Sharma invites celebrity guests, who discuss their latest movie projects, while keeping the audience laughing with his humourous take on several topics.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: Contestants put their minds to solving word puzzles after spinning a giant wheel that determines the monetary value they are playing for.

programme.title: Best of the Kapil Sharma Show
programme.desc: A compilation of the best moments from the Kapil Sharma Show features the renowned comedian Kapil Sharma entertaining the audience with hilarious skits and interactions.

programme.title: Best of the Kapil Sharma Show
programme.desc: A compilation of the best moments from the Kapil Sharma Show features the renowned comedian Kapil Sharma entertaining the audience with hilarious skits and interactions.

programme.title: Indian Idol
programme.desc: Various talented participants from India compete against each other during a singing competition in order to impress the judges and win the title.

programme.title: Best of Crime Patrol
programme.desc: Some of the best cases of 'Crime Patrol', which investigates how innocent people turn into criminals due to the influence of evil in society.

programme.title: Best of Crime Patrol
programme.desc: A compilation of the best cases investigated in 'Crime Patrol' showcases people from different walks of life falling victim to the vices of others or their own.

programme.title: Best of Crime Patrol

programme.title: Best of Crime Patrol - Crime Patrol Satark
programme.desc: A compilation of some of the most spine-chilling cases from 'Crime Patrol', which investigates murders, kidnappings and thefts among other heinous crimes.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: Prahlad and Baji's temptation takes them to the factory while keeping their parents in the dark. Meanwhile, the villagers make up their minds and refuse to listen to Sai.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: Prasad makes an important announcement at the factory and asks them to work hard. Meanwhile, Sai tries his best to make the children drink the concoction prepared by him.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: Sai helps Prahlad and the other children who are suffering as a result of toiling at the factory. Later, Baija Maa shares her concerns about Baji with Sai.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: Prasad forces parents to send their children to the factory, even the sick ones. Later, the children pray to Sai for help and Sai obliges in his usual mysterious way.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: Contestants put their minds to solving word puzzles after spinning a giant wheel that determines the monetary value they are playing for.
